schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

theory.canonical_statement: ration; influences interpretation of gyromagnetic resonances; prompts search for local sources. Falsifiability / Test Handle: Evidence of pervasive rotation without identifiable local drivers would challenge this axiom. 0.0.89 ID 087: Rotation as a Continuously Generated Quantity Type: Structural Constraint Formal Statement: The rate of change of angular momentum L\dot{L}L in a region is determined by the integrated torque density from electromagnetic fields and matter currents: L= $∫$ r× (J× $B+ρeE)dV\dot{L}$ = \int \mathbf{r}\times(\mathbf{J}\times\mathbf{B} + \rho_e\mathbf{E}),\text{d}VL= $∫$ r× (J× $B+ρeE)dV;$ there is no static conserved angular momentum term. Interpretive Meaning: Rotation is always being generated or transferred; conservation arises only as a balance of torques rather than a fixed conserved quantity. Dependencies: ID 085 Derivable Consequences: Predictions of timedependent spin
theory.technical_interpretation: Relation: B+ρeE)dVL is a differential equation, written B+ρeE)dVL. It relates the quantity to its derivatives, governing how the system evolves in space and time. It is built from B, E, V, L. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
